metadata.description: Deploy Intune Analytics Platform with Azure Data Explorer backend - Free tier ADX cluster with powerful KQL analytics
Base name for all resources (max 15 chars)
Deploy new free-tier ADX cluster? Set false if using existing cluster.
URI of existing ADX cluster (only if deployAdxCluster is false)
Name of existing ADX database (only if deployAdxCluster is false)
Automatically grant Microsoft Graph API permissions. Requires Application Administrator role.

manualPermissionsCommand.value:
[concat('# Run in Azure Cloud Shell if auto-grant fails:
$miId = "', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), '2022-09-01', 'Full').identity.principalId, '"
$graphId = (Get-AzADServicePrincipal -ApplicationId "00000003-0000-0000-c000-000000000000").Id
New-AzADServicePrincipalAppRoleAssignment -ServicePrincipalId $miId -ResourceId $graphId -AppRoleId "dc377aa6-52d8-4e23-b271-2a7ae04cedf3"
New-AzADServicePrincipalAppRoleAssignment -ServicePrincipalId $miId -ResourceId $graphId -AppRoleId "dc377aa6-52d8-4e23-b271-2a7ae6b159e6"')]
